name: Lint JS on Save
description: Reminds Kiro to check for Chrome Extension compatibility issues when editing JS files — no CDN imports, no module syntax in content.js, correct chrome.* API usage.

then.prompt:
A JavaScript file was just saved in the Synapse AI Link Chrome Extension project. Quickly check:
1. No Firebase or library imports from CDN URLs (must use local libs/ copies)
2. content.js must NOT use ES module import/export syntax (it is a non-module content script)
3. Any chrome.storage.local calls in content.js must go through safeStorageGet() / safeStorageSet() wrappers
4. Any new chrome.runtime.onMessage async handlers must return true
5. All user-supplied text rendered in HTML uses safeAttr()
If any issue is found, describe it clearly. Do NOT auto-fix — just report.
